video_job.actor_prompt: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall near the quest board, Eri Moonvale (feminine ranger, green half-cape, compact bow case, leaf-shaped brooch) and Eri Emberlane (androgynous coordinator, formal cloak) standing together; Eri Moonvale presents a sealed quest parcel to Eri Emberlane with both hands, visible handoff motion, lively guild background, warm wood textures, high quality anime style, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous guild hall shot; after ten seconds Eri Emberlane accepts the sealed parcel from Eri Moonvale and both characters bow slightly, the handoff completes clearly, warm anime RPG lighting, consistent character appearance, background, and camera angle, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: The interaction is professional and cooperative, depicting a standard quest-related exchange in a fantasy setting. All content is non-sexual and adheres to safety guidelines.

timeline_story.story_verb: completed a visible quest handoff with
timeline_story.selection_reason: Completing the handoff of the charged mana crystal for the relic expedition.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Reliability in logistics and mission support.
